fields.label: Configuting your style settings:
fields.instructions:
The styles on this site are powered by the DarkPhysiCSS CSS framework.
Check out this link for information about the framwork.
Below are the configuration settings to control the style of your site.

fields.label: Alternative Condensed Site Content Pixel Width
fields.name: dp-site-width-sm

fields.label: Optional Extra Large Screen Font Sizes
Note: If left "Blank", Desktop size values will be used.
